content:
💡 frame | Svelte
🎯 Primary Use Case: A user-friendly desktop application for converting and transcoding video and audio files with advanced options and AI upscaling.
✨ Key Features: • Support for various media containers (mp4, mkv, webm, etc.) • Multiple video and audio encoders (H.264, H.265, VP9, AV1, AAC, Opus, etc.) • Hardware acceleration support (Apple, NVIDIA) • Bitrate control (CRF, Target Bitrate) • Metadata probing via ffprobe
📖 Summary: Frame is a high-performance media conversion utility that provides a native graphical interface for FFmpeg operations. It allows users to control transcoding parameters, leverage hardware acceleration, and even perform AI upscaling, all managed by a Rust backend and a Svelte frontend.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
